value.fullName: FSE resolved after alert was raised
value.label: FSE resolved after alert was raised

value.fullName: Wrong alert type (parts availability or replacement)
value.label: Wrong alert type (parts availability or replacement)

value.fullName: Insufficient details provided for Problem Description
value.label: Insufficient details provided for Problem Description

value.fullName: Insufficient details provided for Actions Taken
value.label: Insufficient details provided for Actions Taken

value.fullName: Lack of service documentation in ALERT
value.label: Lack of service documentation in ALERT

value.fullName: Problem can be easily rectified with parts (Cosmetic or operation)
value.label: Problem can be easily rectified with parts (Cosmetic or operation)

value.fullName: Instrument replacement will not correct issue (Application, Environment, Power, Network, or PC Clone)
value.label: Instrument replacement will not correct issue (Application, Environment, Power, Network, or PC Clone)

value.fullName: Service Specialist not involved (resources not exhausted)
value.label: Service Specialist not involved (resources not exhausted)
